data.title: MegPrime gets historic SEC No-Action Letter for 1st universal payments token, MP Token, aiming to transform everyday spending.
data.description: In Dallas, MegPrime Holding, LLC and Megatel Homes, LLC, prominent real estate developers and homebuilders in the US, have been granted a No-Action Letter by the SEC Staff. This allows them to introduce the inaugural universal payments token. Their fintech platform, MegPrime, centers around the MP Token, a digital currency that aims to transform regular expenses into tangible value and financial growth. The platform is envisioned as a collaborative environment for tenants and.

data.title: Lucasfilm's President Kathleen Kennedy steps down, returning to producing. Two studio veterans now lead.
data.description: Lucasfilm's president Kathleen Kennedy has announced her resignation from the position, opting to return to a production role. In her place, two experienced studio veterans have assumed control of the company. This announcement comes as a significant change for Lucasfilm, with Kennedy's departure marking the end of her tenure as president. The move is noteworthy within the industry, given Kennedy's longstanding association with the company. The transition signifies a new chapter for Lucasfilm, with the two veteran executives set to lead the company forward.

data.title: Dave Wethington, P.E., joins HNTB as VP and business development officer, with 20+ years of expertise. Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: A seasoned professional, Dave Wethington, P.E., with over 20 years of experience in federal program and water resources management, has recently been appointed as the Vice President and Business Development Officer at HNTB. Based in ARLINGTON, Va., this accomplished leader's strategic addition is set to bolster the company's expansion efforts.

data.title: NW Natural Holdings (NYSE: NWN) declares quarterly dividend of 49.25 cents per share, annual rate at $1.97. Pay date: Feb. 13.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, the Board of Directors of Northwest Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN) has approved a quarterly dividend of 49.25 cents per share for the Company's common stock. Shareholders of record on Jan. 30, 2026, will receive the dividend on Feb. 13, 2026. The annual dividend rate for the company is $1.97 per share. NW Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN) is based in Portland, Oregon and is a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Gov. Lamont and Sen. Blumenthal showcase STEM competitions at University of Bridgeport, promoting engineering careers.
data.description: The recent FTC DECODE Qualifier and FRC REBUILT Kickoff events in Bridgeport showcased a hands-on STEM competition, emphasizing new avenues for careers in engineering and technology. The event took place in Bridgeport, Connecticut on January 15, 2026. Connecticut Governor Ned Lamont and U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal were in attendance to support the initiative, which aimed to promote interest in STEM fields. This event saw participation from a significant number of students, educators, and professionals, underlining the growing enthusiasm for these industries in the community.

data.title: Pharma data integrity auditor masterclass online event on Apr 22-23, 2026 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com with focus on critical findings and regulatory expectations.
data.description: A training course titled "Data Integrity Auditor Masterclass Training Course" will be held from April 22 to April 23, 2026, and has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. Data integrity, a crucial audit topic for health authorities, has garnered significant attention in the past decade. Despite its increasing importance in recent years, its origins trace back around 30 years. Notable data integrity breaches occurred at Barr Laboratories and subsequently at Able.

WHITE HOUSE OFFICIAL SAYS COMMERCE DEPARTMENT'S SECTION 232 TARIFFS ON SEMICONDUCGTORS ANNOUNCED ON WEDNESDAY WAS A 'PHASE ONE' ACTION, THERE COULD BE OTHER ANNOUNCEMENTS PENDING ONGOING NEGOTIATIONS WITH OTHER COUNTRIES AND COMPANIES

data.title: QGold has engaged ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making, paying C$7,500 monthly for services, signed for 4 months.
data.description: Q-Gold Resources Ltd. has announced their engagement with ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services. The agreement involves a monthly fee of C$7,500 to be paid to ICP, with a four-month initial term starting from January 15, 2026. The contract will automatically renew for subsequent one-month terms unless either party provides a 30-day written notice. There are no performance factors or stock option grants included in the agreement. It is highlighted that neither ICP nor its principals have any current interest in Q-Gold Resources Ltd. or its securities, but they or their clients might acquire an interest in the future.

data.title: Adams Natural Resources Fund reported a 9.4% return in 2025, outperforming S&P 500 Energy and Materials sectors. Character count: 98
data.description: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE: PEO) has announced its investment returns for 2025. The Fund achieved a total return of 9.4% on its net asset value during the year, which includes reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Energy Sector had a return of 8.7% and the S&P 500 Materials Sector had a return of 10.5%. The Fund's benchmark, comprising 80% S&P 500 Energy Sector and 20% S&P 500 Materials Sector, saw a return of 9.1%. Meanwhile, the total return on the Fund's market price for the same period was 9.9%. In terms of distributions, the Fund paid out $2.05 per share in income dividends and realized capital gains in 2025, equating to an annual distribution rate of 8.4% of net asset value. CEO Jim Haynie expressed satisfaction with the Fund's performance, highlighting the 9.4% return in a challenging energy market. The 2025 Annual Report is anticipated to be released around February 18, 2026.

data.title: MUFG Securities Americas, Inc. is designated as a Primary Dealer by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, a significant achievement for the company.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG), a prominent global financial group, revealed that MUFG Securities Americas, Inc. (MUSA), its registered broker-dealer, has been appointed as a Primary Dealer by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York. MUFG stands as one of the top 10 global financial groups.

data.title: CloudLibrary by OCLC wins Gold at 2026 Modern Library Award for digital content platform, expanding to more libraries.
data.description: CloudLibrary is experiencing significant expansion as an increasing number of libraries recognize the benefits and adaptability of the digital content platform. Based in DUBLIN, Ohio, on Jan. 15, 2026, CloudLibrary, operated by OCLC, provides libraries with access to a diverse range of digital content. The platform has currently attained Gold status as libraries continue to embrace its offerings.

data.title: Acme United acquires My Medic, a tactical products supplier, with revenues of $19 million in 2025. Utah-based firm has 40 employees.
data.description: Acme United Corporation (NYSE American: ACU) based in Shelton, Conn., has recently acquired the assets of SLED Distribution, LLC, known as "My Medic". This acquisition adds a leading supplier of tactical, trauma, and emergency response products to Acme United's portfolio. My Medic, founded in 2014 and located in North Salt Lake, Utah, had generated revenues of roughly $19 million in 2025. The company, which employs 40 individuals, primarily operates in the direct-to-consumer channel.

data.title: Adams Diversified Equity Fund reports 2025 returns: Net asset value - 18.9%, market price - 25.7%. S&P 500 - 17.9%, Morningstar US Large Blend - 16.2%.
data.description: In Baltimore, Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) disclosed the Fund’s investment performance in 2025. The net asset value of the Fund yielded a total return of 18.9% throughout the year, inclusive of reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Index saw a return of 17.9% while the Morningstar U.S. Large Blend Category marked 16.2%. The Fund’s market price witnessed a total return of 25.7% during the same period.

data.title: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) will announce Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Jan 29 at 5:30 a.m. CST.
data.description: Caterpillar Inc., a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CAT, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Thursday, January 29th at 5:30 a.m. CST. The detailed statement will be published on investors.caterpillar.com/financials/quarterly-results as well as on PR Newswire. Stay tuned for insights into the company's performance during the specified period.

data.title: Markets to close on Monday for Martin Luther King Jr.'s birthday, impacting S&P 500 trading.
data.description: Trading on Monday will be suspended as markets observe Martin Luther King Jr.'s birthday. The closure coincides with Ronald Reagan's holiday as well. The S&P 500, a key indicator of market performance, will be affected by the holiday.

data.title: Trader sees opportunity in Alibaba stock's pullback post multi-month, but risks remain. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Investors may see potential in Alibaba stock amidst its recent decline over multiple months. However, caution is advised due to associated risks. A trader suggests there may be a strategic timing opportunity in the stock.

data.title: Carriage Services (NYSE: CSV) declares a quarterly dividend of 11.25¢ per share. Payable on March 2, 2026, to holders by Feb 2.
data.description: In Houston on January 15, 2026, Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) disclosed a quarterly dividend of 11.25¢ per share. The dividend is set to be paid to common share record holders on March 2, 2026, who are registered as of February 2, 2026.

data.title: Atha Energy secures $25M in LIFE private placement for flow-through shares.
data.description: The number of new COVID-19 cases in the country has increased by 15% in the past week, with over 20,000 new infections reported. Hospitalizations have also risen by 10% during the same period, with a total of 5,000 individuals currently receiving treatment. The vaccination rate continues to climb steadily, with over 40% of the population now fully vaccinated. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Dow and S&P 500 fall from record highs amid inflation data; Caterpillar rises, Moderna soars.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow and S&P 500 faced a decline from their previous record highs, while Caterpillar showed progress towards achieving a significant milestone. The stock market experienced a decrease as investors analyzed inflation data. Additionally, Moderna demonstrated notable growth during this session.
